X X □ X X
X X □ X X

Instruction: Describe the target grid.
Generate the referring expression starting with the tag "Expression: " for the given target grid. Omit any other text.

Key distinguishing features of the target:
- Has X in the first column (unlike Distractor 1)
- Has only one X in the left section before the empty columns (unlike Distractor 2 which has two)
- Has a single filled column on the left, two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right
- The pattern is: X-□-□-X-X repeated in all rows

Let me think of a clear description:
- "One filled column on the left, two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right"
- "A single X column followed by two empty columns and two X columns"
- "Has filled cells only in the first, fourth, and fifth columns"

content.text: Expression: A grid with a single filled column on the left, followed by two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right.

clem_player.response: Expression: A grid with a single filled column on the left, followed by two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right.
